steps.title: Cancel the common factor
steps.content:
The numerator and denominator share the factor $x+9$. Since $x=-9$ would make the original denominator $0$, it cannot be a solution. For valid $x$, the equation becomes
$$x-9=7$$

steps.title: Prepare the simplified equation
steps.content:
The simplified equation is ready for the last step:
$$x-9=7$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph or solve the original equation directly and choose the solution value. Adding $9$ to both sides gives $x=16$. The answer is C.
